dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used MACD histogram (6-12-9 default) as proxy for 6-day momentum. Entry requires price reversal (MACD crossover) within established trend (price position relative to 40-day SMA for trend direction and 20-day SMA to confirm small reversal, not trend change). Hold window set to 3 days per 'about three days' parameter. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal specifies both long and short setups based on trend direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Used MACD histogram (6-12-9 default) as proxy for 6-day momentum. Entry requires price reversal (MACD crossover) within established trend (price position relative to 40-day SMA for trend direction and 20-day SMA to confirm small reversal, not trend change). Hold window set to 3 days per 'about three days' parameter. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal specifies both long and short setups based on trend direction.

source_rule_text: Use a short-period momentum indicator (6 days) in combination with a longer-term trend (30-50 days) to identify entry points based on small price reversals within the trend.
